summary: Child classes inherit from parents: `class Child(Parent):`. Use `super().__init__()` to initialize parent attributes. Check MRO with `.mro()`.
oneLineSummary: Inheritance enables code reuse and hierarchical class specialization via super().

memoryTricks.trick: Child Class = Parent Features + Custom Upgrades.

nextTopics.title: Polymorphism
nextTopics.whyNext: Learn uniform interfaces across diverse object types.
